title: Inedible-Edible
description: Eat every block and item in Minecraft! Ever wanted to taste bedrock or a diamond sword? Now you can. Includes a smart Shift+Right Click system for interactive items like Ender Pearls. Perfect for funny challenges and survival twists! Fabric 1.20.1.
body:
🍔 Inedible Edible: Eat Your Problems!
Are you tired of constantly running out of food in the middle of a deep cave? Do you hate it when your hunger bar drops just as you’ve started a big build, and you realize you left your golden carrots at home?

We have the perfect solution for you! Welcome to Inedible Edible, the mod that turns the entire Minecraft world into one giant, delicious snack. Why spend time farming when you can just eat the ground you're standing on?

🛠️ How it works:
With this mod installed, every single block and item in the game becomes edible. Whether it’s a chunk of cobblestone, a handful of dirt, or even your spare netherite chestplate — if you can hold it, you can eat it!

🌟 Why you need this:
Never Starve Again: Your inventory is now your pantry.

Survival Twist: Adds a hilarious and useful mechanic to your hardcore runs.

Content Creator's Dream: Perfect for "Can I survive eating only..." challenges and viral videos.

Balanced Stats: Each "inedible" item restores a small amount of hunger and saturation, keeping the game fun but fair.
